summary: Tested Multilink zaap.bio style improvements: 1) Section CRUD (carousel, text, image, divider, header) - 18/18 tests PASS, 2) Link thumbnails - PASS (fixed missing fields in backend), 3) Public page carousel rendering - PASS, 4) Mobile dialog safe-area padding - PASS, 5) Admin section management UI - PASS
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/multilink.py - Added missing description, thumbnail, link_type fields to link_doc creation
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test carousel section for public page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilink module fully tested with new section features. Section CRUD endpoints work correctly. Public page renders carousel sections with horizontal scroll. Link dialog has thumbnail upload. Mobile dialogs have safe-area padding and visible close buttons.

Section CRUD Backend.GET /api/multilink/pages/{id}/sections: PASS - Returns sections list ordered by order field
Section CRUD Backend.POST /api/multilink/pages/{id}/sections: PASS - Creates carousel, text, image, divider, header sections
Section CRUD Backend.PUT /api/multilink/pages/{id}/sections/{: PASS - Updates section title, content, is_active
Section CRUD Backend.DELETE /api/multilink/pages/{id}/section: PASS - Deletes section, returns 404 for nonexistent

Public Page Sections.Carousel rendering: PASS - Horizontal scroll with cards showing image, title, subtitle
Public Page Sections.Scroll buttons: PASS - Left/right chevron buttons for navigation
Public Page Sections.Active sections only: PASS - Inactive sections excluded from public page
Public Page Sections.Card styling: PASS - Rounded corners (rounded-2xl) on carousel cards

Link Thumbnails.Create link with thumbnail: PASS - thumbnail and description fields saved
Link Thumbnails.Update link thumbnail: PASS - Can add thumbnail to existing link
Link Thumbnails.Public page card style: PASS - Links with thumbnails show as cards with image

Mobile Dialog Safe Area.Link dialog: PASS - Has safe-area-inset-top padding and visible X close button
Mobile Dialog Safe Area.Section dialog: PASS - Has safe-area-inset-top padding and visible X close button
Mobile Dialog Safe Area.Social dialog: PASS - Has safe-area-inset-top padding and visible X close button

Admin Section UI.Section types: PASS - Carousel, Texte, Images, Séparateur, Titre options
Admin Section UI.Carousel items: PASS - Can add items with image, title, subtitle, url
Admin Section UI.Section list: PASS - Shows sections with edit/delete buttons

bug_fix_applied.issue: Link creation missing thumbnail, description, link_type fields
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added description, thumbnail, link_type fields to link_doc in create_link function
